## What
<!-- One sentence: the single change this PR makes. If you need the word "and", split the PR. -->

## Why
<!-- The problem / motivation. Link the design doc, e.g. "Implements design §3 FUELINST contract." -->

## How
<!-- Brief notes on the approach and any trade-offs a reviewer should focus on. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Single, focused change (reviewable in ~15 min)
- [ ] `ruff` + `ty` + `pytest` pass locally
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `ci:`, `refactor:`, `test:`)
- [ ] Design doc (`docs/system-design.md`) updated if architecture/decisions changed
- [ ] Linked the relevant issue (`Closes #…`)
